title: quercus dumosa var. elegantula
intro: Quercus dumosa var. elegantula, also known as the elegant-leaved scrub oak, is a variety of the Quercus dumosa plant species, which is native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The leaves of Quercus dumosa var. elegantula are used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include improved immune function, reduced oxidative stress, and enhanced overall well-being, making it a popular choice in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
